prose:
The Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein were computed using the `fukui-reactivity` skill in chemkit.

**Acrolein Fukui Reactivity** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`. SCF converged.

The Fukui f+, f-, and dual descriptor values for each atom are as follows:

| Atom (Label) | Symbol | f+ (electrophilic attack) | f- (nucleophilic attack) | Dual Descriptor (radical attack) |
| :----------- | :----- | :------------------------ | :----------------------- | :------------------------------- |
| 1            | O      | 0.40136                   | 0.39389                  | 0.00748                          |
| 2            | C      | 0.02226                   | 0.00599                  | 0.01627                          |
| 3            | C      | 0.43405                   | 0.09140                  | 0.34264                          |
| 4            | C      | 0.64232                   | 0.08737                  | 0.55495                          |
| 5            | H      | -0.15726                  | 0.08596                  | -0.24322                         |
| 6            | H      | -0.20720                  | 0.18568                  | -0.39288                         |
| 7            | H      | -0.06212                  | 0.08449                  | -0.14660                         |
| 8            | H      | -0.07341                  | 0.06523                  | -0.13863                         |

The most electrophilic site is Carbon atom 4 (C) with an f+ value of 0.64232.
The most nucleophilic site is Oxygen atom 1 (O) with an f- value of 0.39389.

The calculation was performed using the command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp7051wz7c/live.json`
The live `.out` log for this run is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp7051wz7c/live.out`.
